description: The Venice Shoreline Crips is a set of the Crips gang alliance based in Venice, Los Angeles, California. Formed in the late 1960s in the Oakwood neighborhood, it became heavily involved in narcotics trafficking during the 1980s crack epidemic. The gang has been engaged in violent conflicts with rival gangs such as Culver City 13 and Venice 13. Despite law enforcement efforts, it maintains control over its territory with hundreds of members.
